extortion.description: BrightStar Care was founded over 20 years ago on the belief that the best care always goes the extra mile. And that’s why we do exactly that for every client, family and organization we serve across the nation. From personal care, therapy, care communities, medical staffing and more, we’re always there for those who need us, showing that next level care is the most important part of who we are. We call it A Higher Standard®.
